allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'refactor: improve code quality, UI/UX, and security' --body ' *)
PowerShell($cmd = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { $cmd.Source } else { "not found" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
